sections.paragraph:
(“village,” “hamlet” [“fence, castle, i.q. Arab. حِصَارُ.”]), [Hazor], pr.n.-

(1) of a town in the tribe of Naphtali, fortified by Solomon, Jos 11:1 12:19 19:36 Jud. 4:2 1Ki 9:15 2Ki 15:29.-(2) of a town in the tribe of Benjamin, Neh 11:33.-(3) of a district of Arabia, Jer 49:28 [also other places].

[“חָצֹור חֲדַתָּה (“new castle”), [Hazor Ha-dattah, ] pr.n. of a town in the southern part of the tribe of Judah, Jos 15:25.”]
